hero_subtitle: SFTY consolidates fragmented compliance alert queues into a unified workflow to reduce manual reviews, improve case management, and strengthen audit trails for digital asset providers.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Duplicate alert reviews slow compliance operations
problem_description: Compliance teams face inefficiencies when disconnected provider outputs generate overlapping alerts that require repeated manual reviews. This fragmentation creates duplicated work, weakens audit trails and complicates timely, unified case management across compliance workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects overlapping provider alerts, aggregates related data, and structures them into unified cases with complete evidence and decision logs to streamline compliance workflows and reduce manual duplicate reviews.
workflow_title: Alerts move into reviewable compliance cases
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates duplicate alert reviews by routing fragmented provider outputs into structured cases, enabling consistent decisions with preserved evidence and clear audit trails.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond duplicate alerts. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented alert outputs into unified workflows, decisions, cases and evidence, helping VASP compliance teams reduce duplication and improve operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled workflows and audit-ready evidence to reduce duplicated compliance reviews and strengthen operational trust across provider outputs and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help reduce duplicate alert reviews
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how duplicate alerts are consolidated into cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports alert review decisions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for connected compliance workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY reduce duplicate alert reviews?
faq_1_answer: SFTY consolidates alerts across providers into connected queues, reducing duplicated reviews and manual workload for compliance teams within VASP operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, and other outputs into a connected workflow that structures reviews, cases, decisions, and reporting.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, provider results and evidence packages to support audit readiness and defensible compliance review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is designed to overlay existing compliance tools, connecting their outputs without requiring replacement or system disruption.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above providers and does not replace them; it enables orchestration and structured workflows across multiple compliance vendors.
final_title: Reduce duplicate alert reviews with connected cases
final_description: Review how SFTY consolidates provider alerts into controlled workflows to streamline duplicate alert handling and preserve audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
